creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
I opened this in Bugzilla i.e. phabric-admin@ because at <https://reviews.freebsd.org/tag/doc_committers/> (my first view of the area) I got this: 

> Users with the "Can Edit" capability:
> Administrators can take this action.

Now I see, in the sidebar at <https://reviews.freebsd.org/project/members/21/>: 

> Normal Project
> Users with access may join and leave this project.
> 
> Joinable By
> committers (Project)

So, is this bug invalid? 

I mean, is it solely the responsibility of (doc) committers to join themselves?

(Apologies for the noise.)
